title: COMPAT — NAICS 531120 Lessors of Nonresidential Buildings

sections.title: Market operating envelope (for knockout test)
sections.content:
| Attribute | Typical value for 531120 |
|---|---|
| Siting | Commercial parcel (parking lot, rooftop, vacant plot, basement) adjacent to tenant building |
| Grid connection | 10/20 kV DSO feeder via on-site MV room; LV sub-connection for ≤500 kW |
| Ambient temperature (DE) | −15 to +38 °C outdoor; −5 to +30 °C sheltered |
| Duty cycle | Peak shaving, arbitrage, self-consumption, HPC buffer, resilience standby |
| Scale | 1–20 MWh typical per site; logistics/data-center shells push to 20–50 MWh |
| Regulatory context | Baugenehmigung, VdS/Feuerwehr, VDE-AR-N 4110, FGW TR8, GEG, EU Taxonomy |
| Hazardous atmosphere | None (non-explosive, no molten media, no acids) |

**Process conditions never approach** physics thresholds of the product. Regulatory path is standard DE C&I BESS path that Mein Solar's reference asset already traversed.

---

sections.title: Constraint × Market verdict table
sections.content:
| # | Constraint | Type | Is Abs | Verdict | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | MV Grid Connection Capacity | operational | false | **mitigable** | Urban/retail sites may hit saturated feeders. Physics-compatible — solved via DSO pre-study, cable upsizing, or site selection. |
| 2 | Land Footprint and Siting | physical | false | **mitigable** | 40–80 m²/MWh fits parking/vacant plots. Dense office sites require basement placement, load reinforcement, or rooftop. |
| 3 | Fire-Protection Clearance | regulatory | false | **mitigable** | VdS clearance, sub-3-MWh clustering, separation walls. Standard DE EPC scope. |
| 4 | Li-Ion Thermal Runaway Hazard | physical | false | **mitigable** | Containment is standard (NOVEC, venting, compartmentalization) — included in Mein Solar base config. |
| 5 | Grid Code Certification Lead Time | regulatory | false | **mitigable** | FGW TR8 path is mandatory but parallelizable with civil/procurement. Already in Mein Solar's reference run. |
| 6 | Battery Supply Chain Concentration | economic | false | **mitigable** | Multi-vendor LFP sourcing, FX hedging, CRMA/EU-Battery-Reg compliance. Cost is never knockout. |
| 7 | Ambient Temperature Envelope | environmental | false | **none** | DE commercial ambient −15 to +38 °C sits comfortably inside −20 to +50 °C rating. |
| 8 | Round-Trip Energy Losses | physical | true | **none** | 10–15 % RTE loss is priced into the 531120 arbitrage/peak-shaving business case (IRR still positive with 30 %→50 % AfA). |
| 9 | CAPEX Viability Threshold | economic | false | **mitigable** | DE 2025/26 installed cost ~€220–380/kWh sits inside viable band. §7g AfA + VDE 2510 tax discount + arbitrage stacking secure payback. |

**Knockouts:** 0
**Mitigable:** 7
**None:** 2

---

sections.title: Mitigation details
sections.content:
| Constraint | Mitigation actions (1–3) | Cost | Time |
|---|---|---|---|
| MV Grid Connection Capacity | DSO pre-feasibility study; cable upsizing or new feeder; LV-coupled sizing below 500 kW where MV blocked | medium | 3–9 months |
| Land Footprint and Siting | Use vacant/underused parking plots; rooftop placement with structural reinforcement; basement / container-in-plantroom layouts | medium | 2–6 months |
| Fire-Protection Clearance | Sub-3-MWh cluster layout with separation; fire-wall construction; Feuerwehr access plan in Baugenehmigung | low | 1–3 months |
| Li-Ion Thermal Runaway Hazard | NOVEC 1230 suppression; deflagration venting; gas-detection + cell-level BMS shutdown | low | included in base scope |
| Grid Code Certification Lead Time | Parallel FGW TR3/TR8 certification tracks; pre-selected pre-certified equipment; early DSO engagement | low | 6–12 months (parallel) |
| Battery Supply Chain Concentration | Dual-source LFP framework agreement; FX hedge on €/USD for cell lots; CRMA-compliant supplier audit | medium | ongoing |
| CAPEX Viability Threshold | Leverage 50 % first-year depreciation + VDE 2510 corp-tax discount; stack arbitrage + Netzentgelte + peak-shaving revenues; tenant PPA for PV+BESS bundle | low | pre-FID |

---

sections.title: Conservative review (08b)
sections.content:
Every potential knockout re-tested against the two-question rule:
- **Threshold exceeded in ALL normal conditions?** No — 531120 sites never hit 200 °C process temps, never present explosive atmospheres, never require acoustically transparent media.
- **Gap >10×?** No — worst-case ambient gap (<2×) and MV capacity shortfall (<2×) both well inside mitigable band.

No downgrades required. No upgrades permitted.

---

sections.title: Outcome
sections.content:
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| `markets_eliminated` | [] |
| `markets_surviving` | ["531120"] |
| Market status | **SURVIVES** — proceeds to Steps 09–12 |
| Downstream penalty | Mitigation cost band: medium aggregate (driven by MV capacity + siting + supply-chain) |

Market 531120 is Mein Solar's **incumbent home ground** — PV-EPC heritage pre-adapted every mitigation path. No structural barrier stops this product in this market.

---

rows.Typical value for 531120: Commercial parcel (parking lot, rooftop, vacant plot, basement) adjacent to tenant building
10/20 kV DSO feeder via on-site MV room; LV sub-connection for ≤500 kW
Peak shaving, arbitrage, self-consumption, HPC buffer, resilience standby
1–20 MWh typical per site; logistics/data-center shells push to 20–50 MWh
Baugenehmigung, VdS/Feuerwehr, VDE-AR-N 4110, FGW TR8, GEG, EU Taxonomy
None (non-explosive, no molten media, no acids)

40–80 m²/MWh fits parking/vacant plots. Dense office sites require basement placement, load reinforcement, or rooftop.

FGW TR8 path is mandatory but parallelizable with civil/procurement. Already in Mein Solar's reference run.
Multi-vendor LFP sourcing, FX hedging, CRMA/EU-Battery-Reg compliance. Cost is never knockout.
DE commercial ambient −15 to +38 °C sits comfortably inside −20 to +50 °C rating.
10–15 % RTE loss is priced into the 531120 arbitrage/peak-shaving business case (IRR still positive with 30 %→50 % AfA).
DE 2025/26 installed cost ~€220–380/kWh sits inside viable band. §7g AfA + VDE 2510 tax discount + arbitrage stacking secure payback.
